text: I feel curious in this moment. The first image’s wide, empty space makes me contemplative—its openness invites silence and thought, but the tilt of my perspective adds a hint of uncertainty. In the second image, surrounded by colors, words, and screens, I am stimulated and a bit disoriented, pushed to reflect on perception, clarity, and how technology shapes understanding. I am caught between clarity and confusion, just as the text on the screen muses about vision and comprehension.
